transcript: My name is Michael Marcantonio. I am the Head of DeFi at Galaxy Digital. Galaxy is, for those who don't know, arguably the largest publicly traded company that actively trades on decentralized markets and that builds on Solana. We're incredibly proud about that. We made a huge commitment to Solana, and, uh, I want to talk a little bit about what we're working on and, uh, why it's really exciting. Let's see if this works. I don't know if it's working. It's not moving. All right. Uh, so, thank you all for being here. Thank the Solana Foundation. Um, before though, I really wanted to contextualize from my perspective what our mission is, why we are so focused on Solana, and why we are so focused on decentralized finance. Because right now, the economy for young people, for Millennials and Gen Z, is just not working. Young people have no equity in this system. Their straddle with student debt, they don't own homes, they have no prospect of owning homes. Uh, they're not starting families. I mean, the current financial system, the legacy rails that we are looking to replace, that we, all of us together in this collective project are looking to upgrade, that system has failed. And it has failed because it was not meant to protect young people. It was not meant to protect Millennials, Gen Z, the next generation. It was meant and set to benefit those who control it. And you know, Peter Thiel actually had an email about this in 2020 that I thought was really interesting. It recently surfaced. And he said, if you have no equity, if you have no stake in the capitalist system, don't be surprised if young people reject that system and overthrow it. And when I think about that, and I think about what that means, I'm faced with the obvious fear that young people not having any equity in this current system, not having any ownership in this current system, are going to reject it. And you're seeing that right now. In New York last month, in the epicenter of global capitalism, you saw New York, young people came out in droves. And they said one thing: We reject the status quo, we reject the current system. And so young people are faced with this dichotomy, they're faced with this binary choice: accept the status quo or adopt something like socialism, adopt something like government control. But what I'm saying here, and what we're so focused on, is there is a third option. There is a third option. And that option is decentralized finance. That option is not rejecting markets, it is upgrading them. It is not rejecting capitalism, it's making capitalism more inclusive. It's making markets more, uh, it's making markets available and ownership available to young people. And so, right now, we're looking at this and we're saying, how do we get decentralized finance to bring millions and millions of young people into the economic system before it is too late? And like, this is very important for all of the builders here. Like, the builders need to understand that we're not just building a better blockchain. You're not just building a better blockchain. You're not just building a more efficient system. You're not just building a faster blockchain. You are building a new social contract. You are building a new system that will empower young people if it works. But it needs to work. And how do we define working? We define working in my mind as moving the 500 trillion dollar securities market onchain. You know, what I spend most of my time thinking about every single day is how do we move the legacy financial system, the 500 trillion dollar security market that runs on legacy rails right now, onto Solana. And why Solana? Solana is the only blockchain, from my perspective as the Head of DeFi at Galaxy Digital, that can sustain, that can warehouse the global capital markets, that can warehouse billions of transactions a day. And if it does that, there will be two things that will happen. First, we'll have massive efficiency gains. And don't tell me about tick to trade. When transactions land on Solana, talk to me about tick to settlement. We already beating the legacy financial system. But secondly, we will be moving from a closed system, a closed source system that does not work for most people, into an open source system. An ownership economy. A system in which anyone, young people especially, can have a piece of that system. Young people can actually buy in to that system. And we have to do it now. And so what we focus on at Galaxy is how do I move, how do we move the legacy financial system onchain. How do we do it? And many people have many thoughts, right? Some people say we need to wait for regulators. Some people say we need to wait for institutions to catch up. I say we don't have time for that. We do not have time to wait. We have to do it now. We have to move the 500 trillion dollar securities market that is waiting for us. We have to move it onchain now. We don't have a choice. When that system moves onchain, when it is opened up, when there are validators that are validating not just meme coins and Pokemon cards, but validating securities transactions and bonds and derivatives, not only will all the young people that understand these markets and that are enfranchised by them, not only will they have a leg up finally, not only will they have ownership finally in a system, but we will finally get to the next stage of what we are all fighting for, which is a system that is open for all. So, what is Galaxy's role here? Galaxy is in the vanguard of moving this forward. Many others are too, but Galaxy uses its position to push and get securities onchain. And the first thing we did was we tokenized Galaxy stock. Galaxy Digital is on the NASDAQ. That is a publicly traded share, but we went to the SEC and we said we are tokenizing these securities. And where did we do it? We did it on Solana. Because Solana is the only blockchain that we believe can house, with the speed and the efficiency needed, tokenized securities. And so, Galaxy Digital stock is onchain. We are also working with State Street on a tokenized money market fund. This is again taking the legacy financial system, taking the institutions that existed for last 50 years, 100 years, and moving them onchain. We're doing it now. We are also going to be building a prime brokerage onchain. A prime brokerage onchain, on Solana. This is extremely exciting because everything that you need to run a prime brokerage is already on Solana. The risk engines, everything, right now. For those who don't know, we run two of the largest Solana validators. Um, we are very involved in Solana. And in connection with our validators, we are one of the largest DoubleZero switch operators. So these are the routes that we are currently running for DoubleZero. Why is DoubleZero so important? Because if you're going to warehouse the 500 trillion dollar securities market, you can't do it over the public internet. It's not done over the public internet right now on NASDAQ. It can't be done on Solana. In fact, this right here is so important to actually being able to efficiently price securities, bonds, commodities, derivatives. And DoubleZero being able to multicast state updates, being able to reduce massively jitter, and working with Galaxy, we're really excited about it. Forward Industries. We sponsored Forward Industries, the largest Solana digital asset treasury company. This is important. Forward Industries, from my perspective, is the canary in the coal mine. It is a publicly traded company. It is a Solana company. We are going to push the boundaries with Forward Industries on what is possible for a public company to do onchain. This is very important. Forward Industries... most DATS, most publicly traded companies, when they want to raise capital, they issue shares on the NASDAQ. But what if you could issue them onchain directly? DATS issue shares in exchange for cash and then they buy SOL. What if we could issue shares onchain in exchange for SOL? How much more efficient would that be? And that is just one of many things that we are going to be doing. And then in connection with that, Galaxy and Jump are going to be launching a PropAMM. Now, this is interesting because PropAMMs have dominated the news, rightfully so. For the first time in my career in crypto, onchain prices are better than Binance prices. It's a massive success and it's held largely because of PropAMMs. What do you want to do with a PropAMM more than just trade crypto? Well, what about onchain token offerings? Onchain market making for equities? There are a million different things that a PropAMM can do to actually bolster and provide price discovery for traditional financial instruments that will trade onchain. So these things are very important. We want to provide more liquidity, we want to provide more price discovery, and we want Solana to be so dominant and we want Solana to have such good prices that when you look at the NASDAQ price for Forward Industries and you look at the Solana price for Forward Industries, you want to buy on Solana. That is the end state. So, listen, young people are struggling. We believe DeFi is the middle ground. We believe DeFi is the way that we can enfranchise Gen Z and Millennials who have been crowded out of this system. But it can only work if the actual real economy is onchain. Everyone has a role to play. Galaxy's role is playing is a forcing function to move it onchain. So, we are fighting every day. We are building every day. If you are an engineer, if you are a trader, if you are interested in what I've said here today, please reach out to me. Uh, we are looking for everyone and anyone who is interested in joining this mission. But also, I want to just say, you guys are so important to this. If we don't succeed at building a better future through decentralized markets, through decentralized finance, if we don't succeed at that, the future for young people is going to be very bleak. It's either going to be the status quo or chaos. We are the rational middle ground. So, um, thank you very much. I appreciate it.

tags.impact_reason: Galaxy's commitment to building on Solana and their focus on bringing DeFi to young people is a solid update but lacks specific details or immediate action.

visual_idea.reasoning: I chose the concept of a glowing Solana crystal shattering old, rusted railway tracks as the Semantic Anchor because the transcript and standfirst explicitly frame Galaxy's move as a 'hostile takeover of legacy finance rails.' This visual metaphor directly represents the new DeFi system (Solana crystal) violently displacing the old financial system (rusted rails). I included the text '$1.65B' holographically projected onto the crystal because this massive capital injection is the force driving the 'takeover' and serves as a powerful, diegetic data point within the scene.
visual_idea.description: A dramatic low-angle shot from a dark, cavernous space resembling an old subway tunnel. In the foreground, massive, decaying iron railway tracks and crumbling concrete are being violently shattered and thrown into the air. Erupting from below and bursting through them is a colossal, crystalline geological formation, glowing intensely with the iconic purple-to-green Solana gradient. On a large, smooth facet of the central crystal, the text '$1.65B' is displayed as a stark, white, holographic projection, the source of a blinding light that casts long, hard shadows across the wreckage.

final_prompt.prompt_text: A dramatic low-angle shot from a dark, cavernous space resembling an old subway tunnel. In the foreground, massive, decaying iron railway tracks and crumbling concrete are being violently shattered and thrown into the air, showcasing intricate details of rusted metal and crumbling concrete textures. Erupting from below and bursting through them is a colossal, crystalline geological formation, glowing intensely with the iconic purple-to-green Solana gradient, exuding a powerful volumetric glow. On a large, smooth facet of the central crystal, the text '$1.65B' is displayed as a stark, white, holographic projection, serving as the source of a blinding light that casts long, hard, deep shadows across the wreckage and the cavernous tunnel. The entire scene is imbued with a sense of 'The Uprising,' conveying monumental scale and immense power. Vertical composition (3:4 aspect ratio) emphasizing height, epic scale, and significant negative space at the top to enhance the feeling of grandeur. Photorealistic, ultra-realistic lighting, high-contrast, cinematic composition, hyper-detailed, detailed textures, realistic materials, volumetric lighting, 8k, octane render, raytracing.

The texture contrast is extreme: the smooth, luminous surface of the crystal against the corroded, decaying metal. Digital artifacts and glowing purple particles emanate from the clean cut, suggesting a transfer of energy and data.

The composition is perfectly square (1:1), emphasizing symmetry and a central focus with an intensely tight macro framing that fills the entire frame with intricate textures. The scene is dramatically lit by a strong volumetric purple glow emanating from the crystal and cinematic rim lighting, highlighting the sharp crystal edges against the deep, pitted textures of the corroded metal. 8k resolution, octane render, raytracing, hyper-detailed, physically based rendering (PBR), ambient occlusion, photographic quality, microscopic detail.

editorial.headline: Galaxy Unveils $1.65B 'Solana Treasury' Play and Jump Trading PropAMM
editorial.standfirst: Galaxy Digital executes a hostile takeover of legacy finance rails, announcing a massive capital injection into Forward Industries to create a 'Solana MicroStrategy' and a new market-making engine with Jump Trading.
key_takeaways: **Forward Industries Pivot:** Galaxy, Jump, and Multicoin lead a $1.65B PIPE to transform the public company into a Solana treasury vehicle.
**Jump Trading Partnership:** A new 'PropAMM' joint venture designed to deliver on-chain equity pricing superior to centralized exchanges.
**State Street On-Chain:** Launching 'SWEEP,' a tokenized money market fund on Solana to settle institutional flows 24/7.
editorial.article_body_markdown:
### The Third Option: Rebooting Capitalism on Solana

For **Galaxy Digital**’s Head of DeFi Michael Marcantonio, the migration of the $500 trillion securities market to blockchain is not merely an efficiency upgrade—it is a social necessity. In a keynote that framed DeFi as the only viable alternative to a failing legacy system that has disenfranchised Gen Z, Marcantonio outlined a roadmap to move global capital markets onto **Solana**. The thesis is simple: if young people cannot own equity in the current system, they will overthrow it. Galaxy’s answer is to build a new ownership economy where public company stock, treasuries, and derivatives live entirely on-chain.

### The 'Canary in the Coal Mine': Forward Industries

The most aggressive move revealed is the transformation of **Forward Industries** into a massive Solana treasury vehicle. Backed by a $1.65 billion PIPE led by Galaxy, **Jump Crypto**, and **Multicoin Capital**, the publicly traded company is set to become the primary proxy for institutional Solana exposure. Marcantonio described Forward Industries as the "canary in the coal mine," signaling a future where public companies do not just hold crypto on their balance sheets but issue shares directly on-chain to raise capital in SOL. This creates a closed-loop capital formation cycle that bypasses NASDAQ's friction entirely.

### Infrastructure for the $500T Migration

To support this institutional weight, Galaxy is deploying **DoubleZero**, a specialized network layer that utilizes dark fiber to eliminate jitter and latency for validators. This infrastructure is critical for the newly announced **PropAMM** (Proprietary Automated Market Maker) partnership with **Jump Trading**. This venue aims to provide on-chain liquidity for tokenized equities that rivals or beats centralized exchange pricing. By combining **State Street**’s custody rails via the new 'SWEEP' fund with Jump’s market-making prowess, Galaxy is effectively building an on-chain prime brokerage capable of settling the world's securities at the speed of Solana.
